creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
According to UPDATING entry 20131103, this mess happens right now on all systems where either FreeBSD 9.2-STABLE, 10.0-BETA or 11.0-CURRENT is installed and the suggested updating procedure has been initiated:

[...]

Installing libtasn1-3.3... done
===>   Returning to build of libgnome-keyring-2.32.0_5
Error: shared library "tasn1.5" does not exist
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/security/libgnome-keyring

===>>> make failed for security/libgnome-keyring
===>>> Aborting update

How-To-Repeat: Simply follow UPDATING entry 20131103 as requested and watch.
